_description: Append-only price history for the LLM Token Usage Calculator. Each verification run adds a new entry to 'snapshots'. Models that retire from a provider's pricing page stay in the history (so the chart shows the run-out). Prices are USD per 1M tokens, standard list (non-cached, non-batch).
_workflow: When refreshing prices: (1) fetch each provider's pricing page, (2) update site/assets/js/calculators/llm-token-usage.js MODELS array with current prices, (3) append a new snapshot below with today's date and the same prices keyed by model id, (4) update lastVerified at the top, (5) run tests, (6) commit.

snapshots.note: Genesis snapshot. Verified live against claude.com/pricing, developers.openai.com/api/docs/pricing, ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing, api-docs.deepseek.com.
